params.name: Dragon God Sculpture
params.description: Upon learning of the Dragon God's demise, Earth's Will had a series of statues crafted in the likeness of its head. These were made not only to commemorate the historic moment of triumph over a formidable foe but also to be bestowed upon those exceptional Travelers, allowing them to share in the Joy of victory!
